title: 4x MIDHILL Heavy Duty Luggage Straps for Suitcases Packing Belts Travel Accessories Adjustable Bag Strap (Rainbow)
features: Strap Size - Belt length: 40"-74" / 100-188cm; Belt width: 2" / 5cm; Universal luggage strap fit for 20"-34" suitcase.
Adjustable Design - Luggage strap use buckle design and easy to closure and easy to change length. It does not snap when bent inward or outward. Travel worry free accessories.

Versatile Carry Straps- Simple way to attach smaller luggage pieces to wheeled luggage, or secure your luggage with the strap during travel. Heavy Duty Clip,Quick Release Clip. Heavy duty luggage strap for long time using.
Buckle made of super durable poly & plastic material. It does not snap when bent inward or outward. They are strong enough to withstand a lot of rough handling during transit.
